title: Multiplayer Essential
description: General Essentials for multiplayer world hosting and more! Build With your friends with the wand and axiom mods, Create And Share Animations With the customizable player models mod and More! also try our minimum edition, which will almost never update!
body:
Refusals we wont be updating to 1.21.2+ until all the mods we use get updated to the respective version, sorry for the inconvenience
(Primarily Fabric) Just Can't Find A Mod Pack Good Enough For You And Your Friends? Do You Just Want The Basic Of Whats Good For You And Your Friends? Well Look No Further! install the bonus version for extra, or Minimum version just for the 5 neccessities!

Multiplayer Essential

Playing With Your Friends Made 10 times Easier with, 🔷Essential Mod - [(Included In Minimum Edition!)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mpe/version/M1.0.0) Join Your friends Worlds for Free Without hassle! 🟩Sodium - [(Included In Minimum Edition!)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mpe/version/M1.0.0) If You Have A Weak PC This Will Improve Your Gameplay 🟪Indium - Prevents Crashes with the Continuity Mod 🎙️Simple Voice Chat - [(Included In Minimum Edition!)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mpe/version/M1.0.0) Do some of your friends Not Have Discord, Fear No More, with SVC you can talk to your friends with proximity chat! (we will eventually add plasmo support Soon) 📃Mod Menu - [(Included In Minimum Edition!)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mpe/version/M1.0.0) Makes Editing your mods 30 times easier! Looking for more than that? Check Out Our Personal Favorite mods like, 🚶Not Enough Animations - adds more personality to your character! 🔉Sound Physics Remastered - Works Great With SVC! Adds Way More Personality to your gameplay! 🦾3D Skin Layers - Tired of seeing that weird gap on your character's hoodie? 🎧vive craft - Ever wanted to play VR with your friends? 🪨Bedrockify - Do you Like Some of the Bedrock features and wish they are in Java? (added [v1.2.0.1](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mpe/version/1.2.0.1)) 🎮Controlify - Wanna use your playstation or xbox controller for minecraft? (added [v1.1.0](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mpe/version/1.1.0)) 🙆Customizable Player Models - Create Your Own Custom Player Models And Animations (SVC Support included!) (Added [v1.2.0.1](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mpe/version/1.2.0.1)) 🪑FSit - Sit and crawl anywhere using /sit (or `Left Ctrl`) or /crawl (or `Left Alt`) (added [v1.2.0.1](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mpe/version/1.2.0.1) Removed v3.0.0) 🍦Vanilla Refresh - Adds A Ton Of QoL Additions, Like Sitting, Crawling and more! (Added [v3.0.0](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mpe/version/3.0.0)) And Many More! Are You Also Looking for Shaders, because we have A Lot for you, to BLS Shaders Euphoria Patches, Solas Shader Easy Shaders, and many more! report any issues here: [(Discord) r7105: ChitterSync - Form Channel: #modrinth-curseforge-support](https://discord.gg/FbssKEnRZw)

Section 1; Disclamer(s)

We Do Not Intend to provide Support for older versions of minecraft, lower than v1.21 (this may change in the future, because we are considering) We (as in The Reach Productions Developement Team) Do not Claim/Own Any Content provided in this modpack. We (as in Modrinth and Reach Productions) Are Not Responsable For Damages To Your Devices if something bad happens to you Some Mods Have MicroTransactions Included (Physics Mod and Essential for example) if you buy from them, we (Modrinth And Reach Productions) can not refund you, please contact the creators of said mod to request a refund from them

Section 2; Warnings

There are A Mulitude Of Mods In This Modpack (around 200 QoL Mods, Performance Mods, Ect.) so if you have a weak pc we do not recommend this modpack to you Distant Horizions Is not a preformance improvement mod, the purpose of distant horizion is to remove the texture of a block from a distance so that block can be loaded, making it look like you have increased render distance
